name: Koa Table Lamp - 21 Inch Height - TBL4355 - Blue - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the KOA 21 inch blue ceramic table lamp. This elegant piece brings a touch of serenity to your decor with its calming blue hue and artful design. The lamp is crafted with a ceramic body making up 80 percent and a 20 percent iron neck, offering a sleek and sturdy composition. It features an E26 socket providing versatile lighting options for any room. Whether placed in a living room, bedroom or office, the KOA table lamp adds a stylish focal point. Its ceramic design pairs beautifully with the warm glow it emits, creating a cozy ambiance. Enhance your home with this charming lighting solution, blending function and aesthetic to elevate your interior.
